'''Anorad Estuan''' was a renowned [[Dactrurian]] [[Actor/Legends|actor]]. The [[Estuan Theater]] aboard the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] was named in their honor.

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1stm}}
